headline: This Sunday breaks the snacking cycle or extends the pain.
summary: You're losing at one-eighth the required pace; today you cut emotional snacking and add 45 minutes of cardio to actually close the gap.
details: Today: swap all snacking for Huel meals, eat nothing else beyond planned vegan food—no emotional eating today. Hit the rowing machine or treadmill for 45 minutes at moderate intensity; 30 minutes minimum if you can't do 45. Today matters because you've been behind for over 4 years; Sunday is where you've historically derailed yourself. This Sunday, you choose different. Every kg you don't lose this week stays on you another week—the math is brutal.
